title: noronhia boutonii
intro: Noronhia boutonii, also known as the Madagascar ironwood or noronhia, is a tree species native to the island of Madagascar. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Noronhia boutonii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various infections. The plant is typically prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
